texto: Nothing - not prestige, power or pride - is worth sacrificing the things that you truly want, the things that you truly love. "Don't be afraid to take time and smell the roses. Don't hesitate in seeking out those things you hold dear. Seeking them out and holding on to them. And don't ever cease standing up for what you believe in, and fighting for those things that you want. Life is too short. Do what makes you happy, regardless of how others might feel.
explicacao: Citação de Brenda Jackson sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Nothing - not prestige, power or pride - is worth sacrificing the things that you truly want, the…” articula reflexao, life-lessons, things em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
